abilities: Let me help you with that.
Let me take care of that for you.
Let me help you, Angela! (healing Mercy )
Need me so soon, Reinhardt? (healing Reinhardt )
What would you do without me, Papa? (healing Torbjörn )
Who's a pretty kitty? You are! (healing Jetpack Cat )
chatter: Breaking me down just builds me up.
Don't be afraid to ask for help out there!
Don't worry. I'll keep our medic safe.
Here we go again. Shields up!
It's like Reinhardt always says: the best solution to every problem is a very large hammer. It... makes more sense when he says it, I guess.
Stay close to me and I'll keep you safe.
Work together and we'll make it through.
Wow! I've heard so many stories about... everyone on this team! (with only Overwatch members on the team)
I'm not joining Talon, so don't bother asking... (with only Talon members on the team)
Swords, arrows... a hammer and flail? We're practically a Renaissance faire! (on a team with Genji , Hanzo , and Reinhardt )
If it's a fight they want, it's a fight they'll get!
Trust in each other, and we won't fail.
All we have to do is win another!
We're off to a good start!
Dig deep everyone, we can't afford to lose another.
It all comes down to this.
I have a new plan this time.
I should think that one over again.
I'll remember that for next time.
Okay, I'm ready to go again.
Things were going so well! (after multi-kill)
We'll do better if we work together.
Where's the rest of my team?
You're all... taking your time, huh?
I'm on fire! Come on, try me!
Maybe you should just stay out of my way!
(Swedish) I'm giving it all I've got.
Hey! Good looking out for me!
Careful, the enemy is getting back up!
call-outs: Enemy's there. Let's clear them out!
Enemy turret ahead! One of papa's beloved creations...
Who's ready to take some punishment?
If we hold them here, we win!
Just a little bit longer and we win this!
We just need to hold out for a bit longer!
We must stand strong for a little longer!
We've got to hold our ground, everyone!
Keep the pressure on, we can't let up now!
Let's go, we're almost out of time!
Time's almost up! We need to work together!
We need to focus, time's running out!
eliminations: I could do this all day.
I hope you weren't holding back.
I'll be waiting if you want to try again.
There's more where that came from!
You can do better than that.
You looked like you needed a break.
I guess I'm flattered you dressed up like me. (eliminating another Brigitte )
Don't make me get the spray bottle, young lady! (eliminating Jetpack Cat )
Oh no... I still loved your album... (eliminating Lúcio )
Have you been keeping up with your training? (eliminating Pharah or Zarya )
Got you this time, Reinhardt! (eliminating Reinhardt )
Did you see that, Papa? (with Torbjörn on the team)
I'm more of a cat person. (eliminating Wrecking Ball )
I can STILL reach you! (long range Whip Shot elimination)
You can't run from us! (long range Whip Shot elimination)
There's more than one way to use a shield!
This shield isn't just for defense.
You've got your time zones confused. (against Cassidy using Deadeye)
Sorry, Angela. You looked really graceful... (against Mercy using Valkyrie)
Reinhardt? How did you get up there?! (against airborne Reinhardt )
Reinhardt! What'd I tell you about reckless charges? (against Reinhardt during Charge)
An efficient use of my energy.
Thanks for lining up for me.
Didn't expect we'd have time for a break!
Great work, everyone, we really showed them!
And that's why you don't mess with me!
That's what I call poetic justice.
You didn't think I would let that go, did you?
I've got your back when you're under attack!
When you're close, I'll protect you the most!
Some things will never change, Reinhardt. (to Reinhardt )
Sorry, Papa. Back to the scrapheap!
I always had faith in you!
I'll give you credit for that one.
interactions: Brigitte : Lúcio and I have been thinking of throwing a little welcome party for you new recruits. You in? Anran : Do we really have time to be relaxing with everything going on? Brigitte : Sure we do. If we don't keep morale up, we won't be in any shape to fight.
Brigitte : Real glory comes from helping people, not hurting them. Ashe : We may have... Different definitions.
Brigitte : I got your back. You got mine? Baptiste : Yes, ma'am. Or should I say, Captain? Brigitte : Oh, I'm not captain! Baptiste : Yet.
Brigitte : Bastion, how are you liking that new armor Papa made for you? Bastion : *encouraging beeps*
Brigitte : Bastion, is something wrong? Bastion : *concerned and puzzled beep* Brigitte : Your bird-feed was stolen again? *sigh* I'll have to have a word with that hamster .

Brigitte : Trust me, everyone. With Bastion on our side, this is going to go great! Bastion : *sheepish beeps* One of five : Hanzo : Hmph. Junkrat : Who, the bot? *chuckles* I thought he was decorative! Pharah : Just make sure you're shooting them, and not me, please. Reaper : Looks like a pile of outdated junk to me. Widowmaker : Ugh. We're doomed. Brigitte : Well, I'm happy to have you.
Brigitte : My dad says a lot of your missions were disasters. Cassidy : Well, if he'd made me the robo-horse I asked for, maybe I would have stood a better chance.

Cassidy: Now, if I give you this treat, you'd better tell your ma, you hear? Jetpack Cat: *eager meows* (if Brigitte is on the team): Brigitte: Cassidy, you're gonna teach her to beg! ...Aww, but she has been so good lately, hasn't she?
D.Va : I should introduce you to Dae-hyun ! He takes care of my mech when I'm back home. Brigitte : If that's true, he must have lots of experience. D.Va : Yeah, he... Hey!
Brigitte : *sigh* I can't believe I have to work with criminals. Doomfist : A great leader adapts to their team, not the other way around.
Doomfist : Why did the chicken cross the road? Brigitte : Why? Doomfist : Because to stagnate is to die. Never forget that.
Brigitte : If you don't mind me asking, what is your armor made of? Echo : Your father has my blueprints. Why don't you see for yourself? I'd hate to spoil the surprise.
Genji : I still feel that final blow from yesterday's training. Brigitte : Aw, come on. I didn't hit you that hard. Genji : If that is the case, our enemies have much to fear.
Kiriko : Genji, remember the time you tripped over your sword in training? Brigitte : *laughs* Really? Genji : It only happened once. Kiriko : Once was enough.
Hanzo : Perhaps today, the dragon will be sated. Brigitte : That was so artistic! Are you a poet too? Hanzo : I was, once. Now I seek peace in other ways. Brigitte : Still sounds pretty poetic to me.
Brigitte : "Sky shining orange"... What rhymes with orange? Hazard : Uh... *chuckle* Sky's more of a blue, in'it? Brigitte : *sigh* You aren't a poet, are you? Hazard : If I was, I wouldnae know it.

Brigitte : I've been thinking about getting another striped cat, but I'm running out of cool names... Illari : I've named my llama Chuño , like the freeze-dried potato. Brigitte : Potato... You're a genius! I'll call him Hasselback!
Reinhardt : A cat? In a jetpack?! *laugh* You’ve got to be catting me! *laugh* Jetpack Cat : *confused meows* Wuyang : Shouldn't it be “‘kitten’ me”? Brigitte : Ugh... trust me. I've already tried.

Junkrat: So. Did you have a chance to think about my proposal? Brigitte: I'm not putting explosives on my mace. Junkrat: What? Oh, no no no no no, you misunderstood. I was talking about your shield. Brigitte: That's even worse!

Juno : I am happy I have made so many new friends. But... how am I going to keep track of everyone's names? Brigitte : Well... do you remember mine? Juno : Of course, Brigitte! Brigitte : That's the hardest one down! I know you've got the rest.
Juno : I have heard that cats can be quite temperamental, but Fika seems very friendly! Brigitte : They aren't always the nicest. I think she just really likes you. Jetpack Cat : *innocent meow*
Lifeweaver : I envy your amicable relationship with your family. Brigitte : You... aren't in touch with yours? Lifeweaver : We had a shouting match not long ago. If that counts.
Brigitte: Lúcio, have you ever written lyrics before? Lúcio: I've dabbled a bit. What's up? Brigitte: I was wondering if you would look at... Actually, I'm going to work on it a bit more.
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Brigitte : Ooh! Siberian tiger! Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!

Mei : Are you going to the gym when we get back? Brigitte : No way! Today's my cheat day. I'm going to eat a whole apple pie and sleep. Mei : Cheat day? Is that allowed? Brigitte : Of course! My workout, my rules.
Mercy : Brigitte, did you finish the last slice of pie? I was saving it for later! Brigitte : I–It wasn't me this time!
Brigitte : Angela! It's so strange to see you in your armor ! Mercy : I could say the same for you!
Pharah: Ooh... I think I went a bit overboard on the weights yesterday. Brigitte: Pace yourself! That's what I always tell Reinhardt . Not that he ever listens.

Brigitte: Hey, can I look at the wings on your suit again? Pharah: I thought you preferred to stay on the ground. Brigitte: It's for a different idea I had. I-I just thought the view from up there would be... inspirational.
Reinhardt : My elbow servo isn't actuating. Gah, that's annoying. Brigitte! Brigitte : No point in fixing it now, you'll probably just mess it up again.

Reinhardt : Brigitte, isn't it time to size up your armor? It's been ages! Brigitte : I'm not getting any taller. Reinhardt : What? Why not? Aim to be as huge as me! Brigitte : Considering Papa , I'm already a lot taller than expected.

Brigitte : Reinhardt, do you think I should get a helmet? Reinhardt : Do you intend to be struck in the head? Brigitte : I hope not. Reinhardt : Then why bother? You'll just miss the wind blowing in your hair.
Reinhardt : Twice as many Lindholms as I'm used to! Brigitte : But still the same amount of Reinhardt. Torbjörn : Maybe too much.

Reinhardt : How are the grandkids, Torbjörn? Brigitte : Do Astrid and Alma still want to be firefighters when they grow up? Torbjörn : Last I heard, they'd decided to be artists, like their father. Reinhardt : Ah, yes! That creative Lindholm spark.
Reinhardt : How are the grandkids, Torbjörn? Torbjörn : Lucas has gotten so big, you wouldn’t believe it! Heh, the twins pull him into all their pranks. Brigitte : Oh no. Their poor cat!

Venture : This place is incredible! Ah, I wish I knew more Medieval history. Reinhardt : Perhaps I could regale you with the time-honored tales of a brave knight and his noble squire! Venture : No way! Tell me, tell me! Brigitte : Just make sure you do some fact-checking when he's done.
Brigitte: Isn't it reckless to pull enemies towards us? Roadhog: *laughs* Afraid of getting too close? Brigitte: Nope, just thinking of the team. It would help if you did too.

Sojourn : Brigitte, you're one of my best agents. So I'll give you one chance to explain why you put a cat in a jetpack. Brigitte : I know it seems crazy, but she can help! Can't you, Fika? Aww, good girl! Jetpack Cat : *happy meows* Sojourn : *sigh* I should've stayed retired...
Sombra : There's no easy way to say this: I read your poetry folder. Brigitte : What? I... you had no right! Sombra : Don't yell at me. We're both victims here.

Torbjörn : Brigitte, did you check if you brought enough repair packs for everyone? Brigitte : Of course, Papa. I'm not a little girl anymore. Torbjörn : You'll always be my little girl. Brigitte : You're embarrassing me...!

Brigitte : Papa, remember the music festival I took you to? The headliner, Lúcio , joined Overwatch ! Torbjörn : Well, if Null Sector finds that racket as distressing as I did, he'll be a great addition.

Brigitte : Papa, don't the Martins live here? Torbjörn : No, they mostly hang out in that Arcology of theirs. Brigitte : Are they still having problems with curious whales? Torbjörn : Yes, and they still won't let me help!

Brigitte: Papa, is there anything you'd like to say to our teammates? Torbjörn: I'm... looking forward to working with you. One of four : Echo: Likewise. Orisa: And I with you. Ramattra: How gracious of you. Zenyatta: It will be a pleasure. Torbjörn: Yes, well... Let's get this done.
Tracer : So, what have you been up to? Seeing anyone? Brigitte : Oh my gosh, Lena! Tracer : Sooo... that's a no? Brigitte : I'll... tell you later.
Tracer : I still can't believe how tall you've gotten! Brigitte : And now, I can lift you with one arm! Tracer : You'll have to catch me first! *laugh*
Winston : Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? Brigitte : Na! Winston : *chuckles*

Brigitte: Hammond, did you eat Ganymede 's birdfeed again? Wrecking Ball: He asks whether it's still called birdfeed if a hamster eats it. Brigitte: That's a shame. I'll be giving these cookies I made to teammates who deserve them. Wrecking Ball: Translation failure. Profanity database error.
Brigitte: You've got a lot of armor for a little guy! Wrecking Ball: The hamster's temper is rising. Brigitte: I wonder how Mitzi would look in armor like that...
map-specific: We used to come here on vacation. Let me know if you need directions.
I've played a little ball before.
Papa said to deliver my manuscript in person, but... I'd be a little embarrassed...
I'm surprised Papa's come around on omnics. Usually he doesn't change his mind about anything.
That bridge collapsed from a little explosion? Seems like bad engineering to me.
